docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,995.00 FILED BY JONES, GAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, GAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, GAIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, GEORGE THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH EITHER MALICIOUS PROSECUTION OR ABUSE OF PROCESS BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $0.00(WAIVED) SERVED APR-09-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, GEORGE
